series_metadata.series_description: Series consists of paper and/or e-mail related to projects that are being worked on for the Geographic Information System program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area or operating system for 2 years or for the duration of the project, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office area or operating system for 2 years or for duration of the project, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
